message:
🐛 Suppress noisy GA4 error emits for expected auth states (#10746)

- agent_token_failure: skip fetch when local agent is suppressed
- sse_auth_failure: only emit when a token was actually sent (not unauthenticated)
- ws_auth_missing: skip emit in demo mode or when agent is suppressed
- OPAPolicies: guard .map() on potentially undefined data.clusters
- useSearchIndex: guard .filter() on potentially undefined dashboards

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
